title: Localization: append upstream sync findings to UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md (ZAI-172 batch)
description:
Append the hardcoded-English findings from [ZAI-173](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-173) to the translation matrix.

## Blocked by

[ZAI-173](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-173) — QA scan must complete and post findings first.

## Steps

1. Read the findings comment posted on [ZAI-173](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-173) by the QA agent.
2. If QA found "No new untranslated strings" — comment that on this issue and close as `done`.
3. Otherwise, **append** (do not rewrite) to `ui/src/locales/~temp/UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md`:
   - A new section header for this sync date (2026-05-08)
   - One row per finding with columns: File | Line | String | Namespaces missing from
4. Commit the matrix update with message format:
   `i18n: append upstream sync findings 2026-05-08 (ZAI-172)`
   No Co-Authored-By trailers per AGENTS.md §5a.
5. Push to the `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` branch (i18n-only diff, no DOM changes).
6. Close this issue as `done` and post a summary comment with row count added.

## Acceptance criteria

- Matrix file `ui/src/locales/~temp/UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md` updated with additive append
- Commit is i18n-only (no component/DOM changes)
- No Co-Authored-By trailers in commit
